goal: Be able to handle everyday conversations at a basic level in about three months.
constraints: Each week must include at least one active speaking task
Limit toolset to four core tools
entities: 12-week calendar
40-60 high-utility phrases/roleplay scripts for SRS
Weekly measurable milestones for a 12-week speaking/listening plan
Progress tracking system (minutes practiced, phrases added, shadowing, speaking sessions, SRS reviews)
8–12 free clip/script links to start shadowing
Speechling monthly coaching (optional paid option)
4-core tools: Anki; Easy Spanish (YouTube); Tandem or HelloTalk; Phone voice recorder
Optional paid add-on: italki (one 20–30 min lesson per month)
Shadowing routines: duration targets and ramp speed schedule for daily practice
Short Easy Spanish clip suggestions for shadowing
Weekly shadowing practice scripts to shadow each week
Karaoke/lyric video resources for shadowing
Anki cards from songs (2–4 per week)
Song-based shadowing integration into the weekly plan
Song-based micro-task scheduling for the 12-week plan
Recording+comparison workflow for pronunciation improvement (shadow, record, compare, fix)
Forvo pronunciation reference resources (optional)
Starter example scripts/chunks for weeks 1-4 (example-based learning resources)
Interference fixes checklist (1-page)
Hobby-style video content (cooking, woodworking) in Spanish as shadowing material
open: Schedule weekly song-based micro-task into the 12-week plan (one chorus recording per 1–2 weeks)
Implement and review the recording workflow for pronunciation improvement (shadow-record-compare-fix loop)
Provide 8–12 starter example scripts/chunks for weeks 1-2 (example-based learning resources) to support example-based learning
Offer to convert one week into a micro, example-based lesson (as alternative to the above)
Draft quick onboarding templates for language-exchange partners (initial message, trial session, and recurring schedule) to improve reliability.
Create a tiny 1-page checklist of the most common interference fixes (or 6 micro-drills) tailored to your routine.
Add hobby-video shadowing routine to weekly plan: select 2–3 short clips per week; shadow, record, compare, and extract 3 phrases to Anki
Provide 6–8 concrete micro-drill templates (20-minute and 10-minute versions) rotating through drill methods.

Implement 'micro-lesson' grammar protocol: when you encounter a pattern you don't understand in listening/speaking, pause for a 5–10 minute mini-lesson (one example, one quick rule, one practice sentence), then reuse the pattern in a speaking task (shadow, record, compare, fix); integrate into weekly routine.
